item.title: log
item.description: Wiki Log Append-only chronological record of all wiki operations. Grep tip: grep "^## \[" log.md | tail -10 → last 10 entries.

item.title: overview
item.description: Overview Master synthesis of the Royal Game of Ur codebase: architecture, features, and current state.

item.title: index
item.description: Wiki Index Last updated: 2026-04-14 Total pages: 31 Total sources ingested: GitHub repo (micho8cho93/ur) + economy spec Overview overview — Master synthesis of the codebase, architecture reference, and navigation guide Architecture architecture — High-level three-layer design and data flow layer-fro...

item.title: cosmetic-store
item.description: Cosmetic Store & Rotation System Store UI/UX, cosmetic rotation mechanics, preview system, and bundle strategy.

item.title: tournament-economy
item.description: Tournament Economy Entry fees, reward pools, cosmetic prizes, and how tournaments integrate with the currency system.

item.title: monetization
item.description: Monetization Strategy Premium currency, pricing psychology, IAP structure, and ethical constraints.

item.title: progression-currency
item.description: Progression & Currency System XP sources, rank ladder, soft currency earnings and spending, and session economics.

item.title: economy-overview
item.description: Economy System Master synthesis of Ur’s progression, currency, monetization, and cosmetic marketplace.

item.title: expo-router
item.description: Expo Router (Screen Structure) File-based routing layout of the app — all screens, groups, and provider wrapping.

item.title: zustand-game-store
item.description: Zustand Game Store The single source of truth for all in-match runtime state. Bridges the game engine, transport layer, and UI.
